channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran’s gunboat fires on container ship off Oman coast
item.description: The IRGC says the aggression came in response to what it described as the US seizure of an Iranian commercial vessel.

item.title: Russia strikes Ukraine’s Odesa port, kills railway worker in Zaporizhia
item.description: Ukraine's deputy prime minister says the attacks on the country's civilian infrastructure are 'another proof of terrorism'.

item.title: Gaza’s unseen casualties: A surge in stillbirths and birth defects
item.description: Gaza sees a 140% rise in stillbirths and a doubling of congenital anomalies as the devastating impacts of war linger.

item.title: How China is gaining from Iran war by showing it is different from US
item.description: Beijing has leveraged its strong economic relationship with the US, Israel, Iran and the Gulf to keep its stakes safe.

item.title: Iran’s UN ambassador responds to US ceasefire extension
item.description: Iran’s UN Ambassador has responded to US President Donald Trump’s announcement of an extension to the ceasefire.

item.title: US halts shipment of Iraq’s oil dollars to curb Iran-linked groups: WSJ
item.description: A plane carrying nearly $500m in US banknotes was blocked by the US Treasury, according to The Wall Street Journal.

item.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 54 as Trump extends ceasefire?
item.description: Trump said the US would extend the ceasefire with Iran until it presents a proposal and talks conclude.

item.title: Tehran held military parades as ceasefire was set to end
item.description: Videos show large crowds attending a military parade in Tehran on Tuesday as the US-Iran ceasefire deadline approached.

item.title: Trump extends ceasefire and hopes for ‘unified proposal’
item.description: In a social media post, President Trump announced an extension of the ceasefire in the war on Iran.

item.title: Iran war live: IRGC seizes two vessels in Strait of Hormuz amid US blockade
item.description: Lebanon's disaster management unit raises death toll from weeks of Israeli attacks to 2,454, with 7,658 people injured.
